name: V Rolling Bus Corp
recent_news: Acquired by Beacon Mobility in November 2023 (Foley & Lardner advised Beacon); 50-year-old family business sold by Vallone and DeSabato families.
fit_notes: Not a tuck-in candidate: already owned by Beacon Mobility (a direct competitor to Summit/I Squared in the school-bus rollup space). Off the table unless Beacon divests. Note: dataset name 'V Rolling Bus Corp' is a misordering of 'Rolling V Bus Corp.'

name: B & F Skilled Inc
districts_or_customers: NYC DOE (Brooklyn District 13 and other NYC public schools)
recent_news: Long-tenured Brooklyn operator; listed as NYC DOE transportation vendor. No publicized M&A activity. Multiple Benowitz-family affiliated entities at the same Cropsey Ave address (suggests related/sister companies).
fit_notes: Mid-size Brooklyn NYC DOE contractor in a consolidating NYC market; family ownership across multiple Benowitz entities at one address suggests potential roll-up of related businesses, but NYC DOE contract dynamics (Local 1181 labor, EPP rates) make it a complex tuck-in. Useful Summit beachhead in NYC if Summit wants metro NY exposure.

name: E Class Transportation Inc
districts_or_customers: likely Nassau County / Long Island districts (per Rockville Centre HQ)
website: unconfirmed (eclasstransportation.com is a Colorado black-car limo company, NOT this NY company)
fit_notes: Very low signal — could not confirm as an operating school-bus contractor. Address (1367 Tanglewood Rd, Rockville Centre) is a residential street, suggesting a very small or possibly defunct/home-based operator, or a data-quality issue. Requires direct phone outreach before considering.

name: Carrier Management Corp
owner_or_parent: Summit School Services LLC (I Squared Capital) — operates as Matthews Bus Company
recent_news: Acquired by I Squared Capital as part of National Express School (NEXS) carve-out from Mobico Group (April 2025; reported ~$608M deal incl. Durham, Petermann, Stock); now under Summit School Services umbrella. Website nellc.com/matthewsbus redirects to summitllc.com.
fit_notes: NOT A TUCK-IN — this is already part of the Summit School Services platform (I Squared) operating under the Matthews Bus Company brand at 1112 1st St Clairton. The dataset entry 'Carrier Management Corp' appears to be a legacy/holdco name for the Clairton operation. Should be removed from the prospect list.

name: Weikel Busing LLC
principals: Lisa Weikel (Owner; bought predecessor Sharitz Bus Service in 2015; 25+ years industry experience)
service_types: charter (weddings, Penn State football, Farm Show, UPS shuttles)
districts_or_customers: PA Farm Show / PA FFA / Penn State Football charters
recent_news: Open house at new 204 Universal Rd Selinsgrove location announced Sept 2023 (Daily Item). Grew from 26 bus + 9 van runs (2017) to 100+ runs (2021) and 150+ vehicles today.
fit_notes: Strong tuck-in candidate: independent, single-owner (Lisa Weikel) PA operator with ~150-vehicle fleet, two solid school contracts (Selinsgrove + Midd-West) plus diversified charter/industrial revenue. Central PA geography complements Summit's Petermann/Matthews PA footprint. Succession optionality given sole-proprietor structure; growth trajectory (6x runs in 4 years) signals operational quality.
